hub.heading: Choose one vocabulary step
hub.subtitle: Start with today, review what is due, or go deeper into your saved words when you need it.

today.title: Today
today.description: Learn the current daily set and add more only when you want.

review.meta: {count, plural, one {# word due} other {# words due}}
review.title: Review
review.description: Practice due cards without browsing the full collection.

myWords.title: My Words
myWords.description: Search, filter, favourite, and open saved vocabulary.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Browse topics and study paths one area at a time.

publicPools.title: Public pools
publicPools.description: Browse read-only IELTS word banks by source and difficulty.

add.title: Add words
add.description: Create a single card or import a small candidate set.

publicPools.heading: Public vocab pools
publicPools.subtitle: Choose a read-only source pool by level, topic, and provenance.

disabled.title: Public pools are not available yet
disabled.description: This vocabulary source is still behind rollout.

empty.title: No pools match these filters
empty.description: Try a different difficulty or topic.

byTopic.heading: Vocabulary
byTopic.subtitle: Tap a topic to drill into its words. Topics with the most work to do show first.

topicPage.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# word in this topic} other {# words in this topic}}

byTopic.yourTopicsSubtitle: Topics you set in Settings — click to start learning.

filtered.title: No words at "{strength}" level
filtered.description: Try a different mastery filter or clear the filter to see all topics.

myWords.heading: My Vocabulary
myWords.subtitle: Your private IELTS vocabulary. Daily words, manual additions, favourites, and reviews all live here.

limits.aiUsage: {remaining}/{quota} AI calls remaining today. Used {used}. Resets at {reset}.

addFlow.heading: Add words
addFlow.subtitle: Create one strong card or import a small set. Saved words go into My Words.

addWord.title: Add word with AI description
addWord.description: Type a word or short phrase. Preview the IELTS card before saving it to My Words.

importWords.title: Import words from topic or text
importWords.description: Generate candidate IELTS words from a topic, or extract useful words from English text. Choose what to save.
importWords.topicPlaceholder: e.g. climate change, education, public transport
importWords.textPlaceholder: Paste an English paragraph to extract important vocabulary...

noWords.title: No vocabulary yet
noWords.description: Learn via Telegram bot or start a quiz to add your first word.

noMatch.title: No matching words
noMatch.description: Try removing a filter or changing your search.

favourites.title: No favourite words yet
favourites.description: Tap the heart on daily words or vocab rows to collect them here.

history.title: No daily history yet
history.description: Daily vocab batches you generate will appear here for future review.

myWords.title: No words in My Words yet
myWords.description: Daily words you generate will appear here automatically.

myWordsFiltered.title: No matching words
myWordsFiltered.description: Try a different source or status filter.

history.noDetails: No words saved for this day.

review.heading: Flashcard review
review.intro: Pick how you'd like to review today's due words.

modePicker.heading: Pick your review mode
modePicker.flipDesc: See a word, reveal the meaning, rate yourself.
modePicker.mcqDesc: Pick the right answer from four options.

noDueWords.title: No words due for review
noDueWords.description: Add new vocabulary or wait for SRS to bring cards back in a few hours.

daily.heading: Today's vocabulary
daily.allWordsLabel: See all words you've learned by topic

generation.title: Daily vocabulary generation
generation.waitingDetail: Preparing your topic and checking existing words.

learnMore.title: Want to keep going?
learnMore.progress: Generating extra words. This usually takes a few seconds.
learnMore.limit: No extra words left today. Resets in {countdown} ({time}).

empty.title: No daily words yet
empty.description: Generate today's vocabulary from the dashboard, then come back here to practice.

linkPrompt.title: Get daily words on Telegram too
linkPrompt.description: Link your account to receive new vocab in Telegram every day, and to use the bot with a group of friends.
